name: Pimento White Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the rice in a strainer and rinse with cold water to wash it.
2. Bring a large pot of 2 to 3 quarts of water to a boil.
3. Add the rice and cook, uncovered, for about 10 minutes.
4. Test a grain: the rice should be cooked through but not soft.
5. Drain the rice.
6. Transfer to a serving bowl and add diced pimento and olive oil. Toss well.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Nutritional info per serving: 215 calories; 9g protein, 38g carbohydrates, 5g fat (16%), .5g fiber. 6mg sodium.
Exchanges: 2.5 bread, .9 fat
Source: Dinner in Minutes, Miami Herald, 12/14/95
